'''By't Distombe''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]]. He participated in such high-tier podracer competitions as the [[Phoebos Memorial Run/Legends|Phoebos Memorial Run]] and the [[Vinta Harvest Classic/Legends|Vinta Harvest Classic]]. During the Fifth Elimination Finals of the Vinta Harvest, By't was struck in the head by a bottle of [[Vinta Harvest Ale]] tossed by Sebulba. As a result, the Twi'lek lost control over a [[Methane lake|methane pool]]. His cockpit exploded when it collided with a pillar of gas.<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 14" />

==Biography==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], By't Distombe was one of the podracers that participated in the [[Phoebos Memorial Run/Legends|Phoebos Memorial Run]] and the [[Vinta Harvest Classic/Legends|Vinta Harvest Classic]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]. These were large-scale pod races, in which the race included the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]]. In the final round of the fifth race of the competitions, in first place, Distombe decided to take a shortcut over a gas crater. When he was overtaken by Sebulba, he was suddenly struck in the head by a bottle by the cheating Dug, causing the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] to lose control of his machine, which exploded shortly thereafter.<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 14" />

==Appearances==
